docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AFAMEFUNA ODIME ON DEC-09-2011 - DENIED. NO APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DEVGAN, JUHI AS TO DEFENDANT ODIME, AFAMEFUNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ODIME, AFAMEFUNA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEVGAN, JUHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ODIME, AFAMEFUNA $7,195.50 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,330.50, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $4797.00 ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF FOR DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH VIOLATION OF CC 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS SC-220 FILED BY DEFENDANT ODIME, AFAMEFUNA AS TO PLAINTIFF DEVGAN, JUHI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED SEP-24-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ODIME, AFAMEFUNA
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ODIME, AFAMEFUNA HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
